Our Story

रेखा इको फार्म

हमारी कहानी — बिहार की जड़ों से

Rekha Eco Farm is a women-led agricultural enterprise based in Begusarai, Bihar, committed to sustainable farming and transparent supply chains. We believe in fair pricing, direct procurement, and farm-level quality checks.

"We eliminate middle layers. What you get is fresh from the field."
📞
Ritu Ranjan — 9606894466  |  rekhaecofarm@gmail.com
📍 Based in Begusarai, Bihar
🌱 Sustainable Farming
🔍 Focus on Traceability
💰 Fair Pricing Model
🚜 Direct Procurement
✅ Farm-Level Quality Checks
Where We Are

Rooted in Begusarai, Bihar

बेगूसराय, बिहार में निहित

Located in the heart of Bihar's fertile Gangetic plains, connected by modern infrastructure.

🌊

Ganga River Basin

Our farms benefit from the nutrient-rich alluvial soil of the Ganga river basin, providing optimal conditions for diverse crop cultivation in Begusarai district.

🛣️

Modern Connectivity

Connected by Asia's widest 6-lane Aunta-Simaria Bridge over Ganga, ensuring fast logistics and seamless delivery to major cities across Bihar and beyond.

Begusarai is located in Bihar's fertile Middle Gangetic Plain, known for its rice-wheat cropping systems, diverse agricultural produce, and rich farming heritage.

The region's alluvial soil and proximity to the Ganga river make it ideal for year-round cultivation of cereals, pulses, vegetables, and Bihar's famous specialty crops like Makhana and Shahi Litchi.

Our strategic location ensures efficient distribution to Patna, Darbhanga, Gaya, and direct access to North and South Bihar markets.

Farm to Table Process

Our Transparent 5-Step Supply Chain

हमारी पारदर्शी 5-चरण आपूर्ति श्रृंखला

Ensuring freshness and quality from field to your doorstep — no shortcuts, no middlemen.

🌱1

Seed Selection

Carefully chosen quality seeds for optimal yield

🌿2

Cultivation Under Supervision

Expert monitoring throughout growing cycle

🌾3

Harvesting & Sorting

Hand-picked at peak ripeness and quality sorted

📦4

Cleaning, Grading & Packaging

Professional processing with hygiene standards

🚚5

Direct Dispatch to Buyers

No middlemen — straight from farm to you

बिहार की उपजाऊ भूमि से उच्च गुणवत्ता वाली उपज

Impact

Sustainability & Community Impact

स्थिरता और सामुदायिक प्रभाव

Building a transparent, farmer-first agricultural supply chain from Bihar to India.

👩‍🌾

Farmer Empowerment

Supporting local farming communities with fair wages and sustainable practices. Every purchase directly benefits the farmer who grew it.

💚

Women Employment

Creating meaningful opportunities for women in agriculture and rural entrepreneurship, building livelihoods and community strength.

♻️

Reduced Supply Chain Waste

Direct procurement eliminates intermediaries and significantly reduces food waste, ensuring more value reaches both farmer and buyer.

🌱

Responsible Farming

Eco-friendly methods that preserve soil health and biodiversity, ensuring productive farmland for generations to come.
